sections.paragraph:
Original: יעל

Transliteration: yâ‛êl

Phonetic: yaw-ale'

BDB Definition:

Jael = "mountain goat"
  1. the wife of Heber the Kenite who killed the general Sisera as he slept by driving a peg through his temples into the ground

Origin: the same as H3277

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
